title: API client for backend session, document, diagram, and design management
purpose: Provides HTTP fetch methods for communicating with the backend API to manage sessions, documents, diagrams, designs, and related resources.
module_context: Exports an API client object with methods for session management, document and diagram CRUD operations, design handling, code synchronization, and image management. Includes word lists for session name generation.

methods.name: generateSessionName
methods.normalized_params: (): string

steps.content: Select a random adjective from the predefined list.
Select another random adjective from the predefined list.
Select a random noun from the predefined list.
Combine the selected words in adjective-adjective-noun format.

methods.name: getSessions
methods.normalized_params: (): Promise<Session[]>

steps.content: Send a GET request to the sessions endpoint.
IF the response is not successful, throw an error with the status text.
Parse the JSON response from the server.
Map the server data to the frontend Session type with project and name fields.
